Kadir Has Vocational School About Students Who Have Completed the Maximum Period of Study

Dear Students

Senior students who cannot graduate at the end of their maximum education period are given two additional exams for the courses they have continued and failed or never taken within the scope of paragraph (c) of Article 44 of the Higher Education Law No. 2547. In accordance with the relevant law and the decision of Kadir Has University Senate dated 29/12/2021 and numbered 2021/14, it is possible for students whose maximum education period has expired to benefit from the additional exam right by applying to

[email protected]

with a petition until the end of working hours on Thursday, January 27, 2022.

Kadir Has Vocational School Directorate
